overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands with mountains in the distance. A horse-drawn carriage passes by during the journey, and the character briefly tips his hat.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through open grassland with mountain backdrop

events.description: character turns left to look at the grassy field while continuing to walk
character turns back to face forward along the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail, briefly turning to observe the expansive grassland to the left before resuming forward gaze

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grassland
rolling green grasslands extending to the horizon with tall wild grasses
large rocky mountain range with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance
solitary oak trees dotting the grassland landscape
weathered wooden signpost with directional arrows emerging on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through expansive green grasslands under a clear blue sky. Rocky mountains rise in the distance. The character briefly turns to observe the field to the left before continuing forward, passing a wooden signpost on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail with horse-drawn carriage encounter

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants appears in the distance approaching on the trail
carriage passes by the character on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two male occupants moving along the trail toward and past the character

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a wooden signpost is passed on the left. A horse-drawn carriage with two occupants approaches from the distance and passes by on the right side of the trail. The carriage is red with large wooden wheels and drawn by two horses.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing dirt trail through grassland with distant mountains

events.description: character raises right hand to tip his hat while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the trail through the grassland, tipping his hat with his right hand as he proceeds

entered.detail: clusters of dense green shrubbery lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: After the carriage passes, the character continues his journey along the dirt trail. Green bushes line the right side of the path while the open grassland stretches to the left. The character tips his hat as he walks toward the distant mountains under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from a quiet walk through open grasslands into a brief social encounter. It begins with the character traversing expansive green fields under a clear blue sky, glancing toward the landscape before passing a wooden signpost on the left. As the journey continues, the solitude is interrupted by a red horse-drawn carriage with two occupants that approaches from the distance and rolls past on the right. The scene then shifts back to the stillness of the trail, where green bushes line the path and the open grassland stretches toward the horizon. Finally, the character tips his hat in a gesture of courtesy while continuing his steady walk toward the rocky mountains in the distance.
